name: generateCacheKey
description: 生成输入数据的哈希值作为缓存键

name: initCacheStore
description: 初始化缓存存储

name: getCacheStore
description: 获取缓存存储实例

name: initSessionStore
description: 初始化会话存储

name: getSessionStore
description: 获取会话存储实例

name: withCache
description:
带缓存的高阶函数包装器
包装一个异步函数，使其自动使用缓存

name: CacheStore
description: 缓存存储接口

name: SessionStore
description: 会话存储接口（基于 Hash 结构）

name: CacheOptions
description: 缓存配置选项

name: completeAgentSession
description: Mark an AgentSession as a terminal state (COMPLETED / FAILED / CANCELLED).

name: createAgentRun
description: Create a new AgentRun and update AgentSession.currentRunId.

name: finishAgentRun
description: Update AgentRun status to a terminal state and record completion time.

name: createCrashRecoveryEventId
description: Generate a stable crash-recovery event ID for the given run.

name: recoverCrashedAgentRuns
description: Converge persisted `running` runs not owned by the current process into `failed` and backfill a stable crash error event.

name: RecoverCrashedAgentRunsCommand
description: Input type for the crashed workflow recovery command.

name: RecoverCrashedAgentRunsResult
description: Result of crashed workflow recovery.

name: createBranch
description: Creates a new entity_branch with baseChangesetId set to the latest main changeset ID.

name: batchUpdateEntryBefore
description: Batch-update the `before` field of changeset entries. Used exclusively for rebase before-rewrite.

name: upsertAutoTranslationEntry
description:
Application-level upsert: find existing auto_translation changeset entry and
update it, or insert a new one.

name: applyContentGraphEnvelope
description:
Persist relation types and nodes for a structured content graph payload.

Merges CoreRelationTypeDefinitions with payload.relationTypes and upserts
all relation types by (namespace, name, version). Upserts nodes by
(projectId, importerId, sourceRootRef, stableSourceNodeRef). Returns
node ref maps for subsequent diffing.

name: deleteContentNode
description: Delete a content node (cascading to its relations and children).

name: insertSemanticDiffEntry
description: Insert a single semantic diff entry record.

name: persistContentGraphAttachments
description:
Persist relations and context evidence from a structured content graph payload.

After element diff creates/updates elements, resolves payload.relations
and payload.evidence endpoint refs to database IDs and persists them.

name: updatePrimaryElementRelationsForDiff
description: Update primary containment relations for stable-identity diffs.

name: addElementContextEvidence
description: Add context evidence rows for elements in bulk.

name: AddElementContextEvidenceCommand
description: Command input for adding element context evidence.

name: parseAndSaveCrossReferences
description:
Parses #N references in text and saves them to the cross_reference table.
On edit: deletes old references for this source, then inserts fresh ones.

name: replaceTermRecallVariants
description:
Idempotent replace: delete all existing variants for (conceptId, languageId)
and insert the new set in a single transaction.

Designed to be called after term content changes. Passing an empty
`variants` array is a valid "clear" operation.

name: claimIssue
description:
Atomically claims the first OPEN issue matching claimPolicy in the project (FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED).

Returns null if no claimable issue is available.

name: replaceMemoryRecallVariants
description:
Idempotent replace: delete all existing variants for
(memoryItemId, languageId, querySide) and insert the new set.

name: createNotification
description: Create an in-app notification record and publish notification:created event.

name: markAllNotificationsRead
description: Mark all notifications as read.

name: markNotificationRead
description: Mark notification read.

name: upsertMessagePreference
description: Update user message preference (upsert).

name: grantFirstUserSuperadmin
description:
检查是否为首位注册用户：若是，自动授予 system#superadmin 权限元组，
并将 setting "system:first_user_registered" 置为 true。

性能优化：只查一次 setting（O(1)），不走 count(*)。
幂等：若 setting 已存在则直接返回。

name: grantPermissionTuple
description:
插入权限关系元组，已存在则忽略（幂等）。
联写规则：当 objectType=project 且 relation ∈ {editor,admin,owner} 时，
同一事务内额外 grant `direct_editor`（幂等）。

name: insertAuditLogs
description: 批量插入鉴权审计日志。写入失败时静默忽略，不影响业务流程。

name: revokePermissionTuple
description:
删除权限关系元组。元组不存在时静默完成（幂等）。
联动规则：当 objectType=project 且 relation ∈ {editor,admin,owner} 时，
移除当前元组后，若 Subject 对该 project 已无任何 editor+ 来源，
则联动 revoke `direct_editor` 和 `isolation_forced`。

name: seedSystemRoles
description:
幂等地确保 4 个系统角色存在于数据库中。
使用 INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING。

name: updatePluginConfigInstanceValueIfUnchanged
description: Update a plugin config instance value only when its version is unchanged.

name: UpdatePluginConfigInstanceValueIfUnchangedCommand
description: Command payload for updating a config instance value only when the version is unchanged.

name: updateProjectFeatures
description:
Update project feature flags. When pullRequests toggles from true to false,
first checks for active PRs (rejects if any exist), then revokes all isolation_forced tuples in the same transaction.

name: closePR
description: Close a PR: set PR status to CLOSED and update associated branch to ABANDONED.

name: createPR
description: Create a PR: allocate number, create associated branch, and insert the PR record.

name: mergePR
description: Merge a PR: set PR status to MERGED and update associated branch to MERGED. Fires pr:merged event.

name: submitReview
description:
Submit a PR review: APPROVE keeps the PR in REVIEW (or moves back to OPEN if CHANGES_REQUESTED),
CHANGES_REQUESTED sets PR status to CHANGES_REQUESTED.

name: updatePRStatus
description: Update PR status (state machine transitions: DRAFT→OPEN→REVIEW→MERGED/CLOSED etc.).

name: updatePR
description: Update a PR's title, body, or reviewers list.

name: claimQaReviewQueueItem
description: Mark a QA review queue item as claimed and record the claimant.

name: createQaReviewAnnotation
description: Create an annotation under a QA review queue item and update queue activity counters.

name: createQaReviewRunWithFindings
description: Create a QA review run and its findings in the same transaction.

name: createQaReviewSuggestion
description: Create the unique suggestion record for an annotation whose intent is `SUGGESTION`.

name: markQaReviewSuggestionApplied
description: Mark a QA review suggestion as applied and accept the corresponding annotation.

name: materializeQaReviewQueueItem
description: Materialize or update a QA review queue item from the current translation findings.

name: rejectQaReviewSuggestion
description: Reject an open QA review suggestion and reject the corresponding annotation.

name: submitQaReviewDecision
description: Submit a QA review decision and perform finding closure plus optimistic concurrency checks when needed.

name: submitQaReviewAction
description: Submit an atomic QA workbench review action.

name: transitionQaReviewAnnotation
description: Transition a QA review annotation according to the explicit state machine and sync queue unresolved counts.

name: allocateNumber
description:
Atomically increments the project_sequence and returns the allocated number.
Auto-initializes if no record exists for the given projectId.

name: attachChunkSetToString
description: Attach vectorization results (ChunkSet) to existing VectorizedString rows and set status to ACTIVE.

name: updateVectorizedStringStatus
description: Batch-update the status of VectorizedString rows (for state machine transitions such as marking VECTORIZE_FAILED).

name: autoApproveContentNodeTranslations
description: Auto-approve the latest translation for each element under a content node in the target language.

name: autoApproveOperationScopeTranslations
description: Auto-approve the latest translation for the provided element set in the target language.

name: createProjectTranslationSnapshot
description: Create a translation snapshot for the project, recording all currently approved translations.

name: getRedisHandle
description: Get the global Redis handle, creating and caching it when needed.

name: getCurrentRedisHandle
description: Read the current Redis handle without creating a new connection.

name: AgentRunByInternalId
description: Query an agent run and its blackboard snapshot by internal ID.

name: getCommentRecipient
description: Resolve the notification recipient for a comment: reply author or translation author. Returns null when same as commenter.

name: countContentNodeElements
description: Count translatable elements under a content node matching the given filters.

name: countContentNodeTranslations
description: Count translations for a given language under a content node.

name: buildEditorScopeElementFilterSql
description: Build the shared CTE/filter SQL used by editor-scope element queries.

name: listEditorScopeElements
description: List elements by editor scope with pagination; an empty `contentNodeIds` means the whole project.

name: countEditorScopeElements
description: Count the elements matching filters inside the editor scope.

name: getEditorScopeFirstElement
description: Get the first matching element in the editor scope, or the first one after a given element.

name: getEditorScopeElementPageIndex
description: Calculate the zero-based page index of an element under the same editor scope and filters; returns `null` if the element is out of scope.

name: ListEditorScopeElementsQuery
description: Type for paginated editor-scope element queries.

name: CountEditorScopeElementsQuery
description: Type for editor-scope element count queries.

name: GetEditorScopeFirstElementQuery
description: Type for fetching the first matching element in an editor scope.

name: GetEditorScopeElementPageIndexQuery
description: Type for editor-scope element page-index queries.

name: buildElementPriorityPlan
description: Build an ephemeral element-priority plan for the current editor scope.

name: orderRowsByPriorityPlan
description: Reorder rows by a priority plan and attach lightweight priority summaries.

name: PriorityRankableEditorElement
description: Editor element row that can participate in priority ranking, including structural position.

name: ElementPriorityPlanItem
description: Ranked result for a single element inside the priority plan.

name: ElementPriorityPlan
description: Ephemeral element-priority plan for the current scope.

name: findProjectContentNodeByLabel
description: Find a content node in a project by displayLabel (optionally filtered by kind).

name: getContentNodeBlobInfo
description: Get the blob storage info (key, storageProviderId, fileName) for the content node's file.

name: getContentNodeElementPageIndex
description: Get the page index of an element within its content node's element list (ordered by localOrder).

name: getContentNodeFirstElement
description: Get the first translatable element under a content node matching the given filters.

name: getContentRelation
description: Fetch a single ContentRelation row by ID.

name: getContextEvidence
description: Fetch a single ContextEvidence row by ID.

name: getElementTranslationStatus
description: Get the translation status for a single translatable element.

name: getProjectRootContentNode
description: Get the root content node of a project (kind = PROJECT_ROOT).

name: listContentNodeElementIds
description: Get all translatable element IDs that belong to a content node (primary relations).

name: listContentNodeElementsWithChunkIds
description: Get all elements under a content node along with their chunk IDs (for batch auto-translation).

name: listEditorScopeContentNodes
description: List content nodes visible for a project under main or branch-overlay visibility.

name: ListEditorScopeContentNodesQuery
description: Type for listing content nodes visible to an editor scope.

name: listReferencesFrom
description: Forward lookup: given a source, list all targets it references.

name: listReferencesTo
description: Reverse lookup: given a target (Issue or PR), list all sources that reference it.

name: getElementProject
description: Get the projectId the element belongs to (directly from translatableElement table).

name: getElementSourceLocation
description: Get the source file location info for an element (for editor source navigation).

name: getElementWithChunkIds
description: Get a single element's source text and its chunk IDs (for vector recall).

name: getTranslatableElementRow
description: Get the full `TranslatableElement` table row by element ID.

name: GetTranslatableElementRowQuery
description: Type for fetching a full translatable-element row.

name: listElementComments
description: Query comments on an element with their replies, ordered by most recent.

name: listElementSourceTexts
description: Batch-fetch element source texts via the vectorizedString join.

name: listElementsForDiff
description: Get element data for diff display by a list of element IDs.

name: listElementsWithChunkIdsByIds
description: Batch-fetch element source text, project, primary content node, and chunk ids.

name: ListElementsWithChunkIdsByIdsQuery
description: Type for bulk element detail queries.

name: ElementWithChunkIdsById
description: Element detail with chunk metadata.

name: fetchTermsByConceptIds
description:
Fetch full term pair details for a list of concept IDs.

Unlike `listLexicalTermSuggestions`, this does not perform any matching —
it simply resolves the source + translation term texts and definition for
the given concept IDs. Pairs with no matching term in either language are
omitted.

name: buildConceptVectorizationText
description:
Build a structured text representation of a term concept for embedding
vectorization, following the genus–differentia definition method.

Output format:
```
Terms: creeper、苦力怕、爬行者
Subjects:
 - 敌对生物: 危险且具侵略性的生物…
Definition: 绿色的，会悄悄接近玩家并自爆的怪物。
```

Returns `null` if no meaningful content exists (no terms, no subjects, no
definition), indicating that this concept should not be vectorized.

name: LookedUpTerm
getConceptRecallDetail
description:
Fetch all data required to build recall variants for a single concept.

This is a conceptId-only snapshot query: it does not filter by glossaryId
and does not require knowing the source / translation language in advance.
The caller (variant builder) is responsible for language filtering.

name: listMorphologicalTermSuggestions
description:
Query `TermRecallVariant` by trigram similarity on `normalizedText`,
then assemble full term pairs via `fetchTermsByConceptIds`.

Returns LookedUpTerm[] with confidence derived from trigram similarity.

name: listTermConceptIdsByRecallVariants
description:
Lightweight query that returns only the set of conceptIds whose
`TermRecallVariant` records match the given normalizedText by trigram
similarity. Used by `deduplicateAndMatchOp` to check existence without
fetching the full term pair data.

name: getClaimableIssue
description:
Returns the first claimable OPEN issue in the project (filtered by claimPolicy), without locking.
This is a "peek" query — actual atomic claim uses claim-issue.cmd with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED.

name: listMemoryItemIdsByElement
description: List all memory item UUIDs associated with a given element.

name: listTemplateMemorySuggestions
description:
Query `MemoryRecallVariant` by direct equality match on `meta->>'template'`.

This bypasses pg_trgm similarity entirely, making it suitable for
template-based recall where semantically-equivalent placeholder forms
(e.g. "1.20" → "1.21" → "{NUM_0}.{NUM_1}") would score too low under
trigram similarity to surface via the variant channel.

The template string is stored in the variant's `meta` field during variant
building (`buildMemoryRecallVariantsOp`), keyed as `"template"`.

name: listVariantMemorySuggestions
description:
Query `MemoryRecallVariant` by trigram similarity on `normalizedText`,
then fetch the full memory item details.

This covers the morphological recall channel for memory items:
- fragment recall (partial surface match)
- lemma recall (normalized token join)
- template recall (TOKEN_TEMPLATE variant)

Results are returned as `RawMemorySuggestion[]` so they are directly
compatible with the existing `streamSearchMemoryOp` dedup pipeline.

name: countUnread
description: Count unread notifications.

name: getEnabledChannels
description: Get enabled channels for a user's message category. Falls back to `["IN_APP"]`.

name: getNotification
description: Get a single notification by ID (restricted to the owner).

name: listNotifications
description: Query paginated notifications.

name: listPreferences
description: List all message preferences for a user.

name: loadUserSystemRoles
description:
加载用户的系统级角色（system object 上的权限元组）。
返回用户对 system:* 持有的所有 relation 列表。

name: checkServiceReferences
description: Check if a plugin service is referenced by any entity (mfaProvider / blob / chunk).

name: countProjectElements
description: Count all translatable elements in a project matching the given filters.

name: findOpenAutoTranslatePR
description: Find the currently open AUTO_TRANSLATE PR for the given language.

name: getPRByNumber
description: Get a PR by (projectId, number).

name: getPRDiff
description: Get the changeset entries (diff) for the branch associated with the PR.

name: getPR
description: Get a PR by externalId.

name: listPRs
description: List PRs in a project with optional status filter and pagination.

name: countQaReviewQueueItems
description: Count QA review queue items under the current editor scope plus queue filters.

name: countQaReviewableElements
description: Count reviewable QA elements under current filters.

name: getFirstQaReviewableElement
description: Get the first (or next after afterElementId) reviewable element.

name: getQaReviewNotificationRecipient
description: Resolve the user who should receive a QA review notification while avoiding self-notifications.

name: getQaReviewQueueItemProject
description: Get the owning project for a QA review queue item.

name: getQaReviewAnnotationProject
description: Get the owning project for a QA review annotation.

name: getQaReviewSuggestionProject
description: Get the owning project for a QA review suggestion.

name: getQaReviewQueueItemDetail
description: Get a single QA review queue item detail including source/candidate/approved translations and related findings/annotations/suggestions/decisions.

name: getQaReviewSuggestion
description: Fetch a single QA review suggestion by ID.

name: getQaReviewableElementDetail
description: Get QA reviewable element detail including all pending candidates and approval state.

name: listQaReviewAnnotations
description: List annotations under a queue item, hiding hidden annotations by default.

name: listQaReviewFindings
description: List QA review findings for a queue item, hiding suppressed/superseded entries by default.

name: listQaReviewQueueItems
description: List QA review queue items with pagination using the shared editor scope and queue filters.

name: buildQaReviewableElementsSql
description: Build SQL for QA reviewable elements aggregated by element.

name: listQaReviewableElements
description: List reviewable QA elements paginated by element.

name: resolveQaReviewProfile
description: Resolve the most specific QA review profile for the given project/language/content-node/branch scope.

name: getTranslationCreatedEventContext
description: Resolve project, element, and primary content-node context for translation ids.

name: TranslationCreatedEventContext
description: Context payload for translation-created events.

name: getTranslationQaContext
description: Fetch the context required to run translation QA (translation text, source text, language info).

name: getUserEmail
description: Get a user's email address by user ID.

name: PostgresTaskQueueOptions
description: Optional configuration for the PostgreSQL task queue.

name: resolveRuntimeProfile
description: Resolve the CAT runtime profile from environment variables.

name: initRuntimeState
description: Initialize the process-wide CAT runtime state.

name: getRuntimeState
description: Get the current CAT runtime state from the process.

name: requireRuntimeState
description: Get the current runtime state, or throw when it has not been initialized.

name: RuntimeProfileName
description: Runtime profile name.

name: RuntimeBackend
description: Runtime backend kind.

name: SearchRuntimeLevel
description: Search runtime capability level.

name: RuntimeFeature
description: Runtime feature flag name.

name: RuntimeStorePolicy
description: Summary of a single runtime storage policy.

name: RuntimeProfile
description: Resolved runtime profile configuration.

name: DatabaseRuntimeSummary
description: Summary of database runtime capabilities.

name: RuntimeState
description: Process-wide shared runtime state snapshot.

name: OperationContext
description:
Cross-cutting context passed through operation chains.
Contains a trace ID for distributed tracing, an optional abort signal,
and an optional plugin manager instance override.

name: addTermToConceptOp
description:
Add a term entry to an existing termConcept.

After the write completes, the domain event handler automatically
triggers concept re-vectorization (term list changes affect the vectorization text).

name: autoTranslateOp
description:
Auto-translate a translatable element.

Fetches machine-translation suggestions and memory matches in parallel,
then applies a priority rule to pick the best candidate and create a
translation record. Priority: memory > MT suggestion.
Returns `{}` when no candidate is available.

name: buildMemoryRecallVariantsOp
description:
Build recall variants for a single memory item and persist them.

SOURCE side variants:
  - SURFACE: exact source text
  - CASE_FOLDED: lowercased
  - LEMMA: joined lemmas (when NLP tokens available)
  - TOKEN_TEMPLATE: canonical source template (placeholder form)
  - FRAGMENT: content tokens joined (stop words stripped)

TRANSLATION side variants:
  - SURFACE: exact translation text
  - CASE_FOLDED: lowercased

name: buildTermRecallVariantsOp
description:
Build and persist recall variants for a single concept.

Variant types produced:
- SURFACE: exact original text
- CASE_FOLDED: lowercased text
- LEMMA: joined lemmas (when NLP tokens provided)

For multi-word terms a limited lemma window is also stored (windowSize in meta).

name: collectEffectiveMemoryRecallOp
description: Recall effective project+personal memories and dedupe with project-first precedence.

name: CollectEffectiveMemoryRecallInput
description: Effective memory recall input.

name: collectMemoryRecallOp
description:
Aggregated memory recall — multi-channel evidence merge.

Channels (in order of speed):
1. Exact match (fastest)
2. trgm similarity
3. Variant-based (morphological / template / fragment)

All results are globally deduplicated by `memoryItem.id`, keeping the
highest confidence across all channels. Evidence from multiple channels
is merged onto the winning result.

name: calibrateBm25Confidence
description:
Batch-normalize BM25-channel evidences within a result set.

Algorithm:
1. Collect all BM25 channel confidences as rawScores
2. Compute maxRaw = max(rawScores)
3. Calibrated confidence = min(rawScore / maxRaw, 1.0) * boostFactor, capped at 0.85
4. If sparse evidence hit rate >= 0.5, append multi-evidence markup

name: calibrateMemoryBm25
description:
Apply BM25 confidence calibration to memory recall RawResult[].

Mutates the evidences array of each result in-place.

name: calibrateTermBm25
description: Apply confidence calibration to term recall RawResult[] (currently no-op, reserved for architectural consistency).

name: CalibratedBm25Evidence
description: Calibrated BM25 evidence with raw score and normalization metadata.

name: CalibrationSummary
description: Summary of batch BM25 calibration.

name: createElementOp
description:
Create translatable elements.

First creates TranslatableStrings (with vectorization), then inserts
the corresponding TranslatableElement rows.

name: createTermOp
description:
Create term entries.

Directly stores term text (text + languageId), then builds the
structured vectorization text for each termConcept and vectorizes it.

name: createTranslationOp
description:
Create translation records.

1. Create translatable strings (enqueue vectorization when services are available)
2. Insert translation records
3. Trigger optional publish notification via domain event
4. Optionally write to translation memory
5. Run QA checks for every created translation

name: createVectorizedStringOp
description:
Create vectorized strings and enqueue background vectorization when vector services are available.

Inserts VectorizedString rows (status=PENDING_VECTORIZE) into the database first,
and only enqueues the vectorization task plus publishes a domain event when both
`vectorizerId` and `vectorStorageId` are available. Otherwise it only creates the
string records and leaves later re-vectorization to follow-up flows.

name: deduplicateAndMatchOp
description:
Deduplicate term candidates and match against the existing glossary.

1. Normalize-deduplicate candidates by normalizedText (lemma) as the aggregation key
2. Batch-compare against the existing glossary via the recall variant existence query
3. Mark candidates that already exist in the glossary

name: deleteTermOp
description:
Delete a term entry.

After deletion, the domain event handler automatically triggers
concept re-vectorization.

name: classifySemanticElementDiffForTest
description: Classify a single matched element pair semantically (pure function, testable).

name: diffStructuredContentOp
description:
Diff elements by stable identity from a structured content payload
and record semantic diff entries.

name: fetchAdviseOp
description:
Fetch machine-translation suggestions.

Queries the TRANSLATION_ADVISOR plugin service for MT suggestions,
with optional glossary term injection, translation memory context,
and element metadata. Upstream callers can pass preloaded terms/memories
via `preloadedTerms` / `preloadedMemories` to skip internal DB queries.

name: fetchBestTranslationCandidateOp
description:
Fetch the best translation candidate by running advisor + memory recall
in parallel and picking the highest-confidence result. Memory > advisor.
Individual provider failures are silently suppressed.

name: findOrCreateAutoTranslatePR
description:
Find or create an AutoTranslate PR for the given language.
Concurrency safety is ensured by a partial unique index on the pullRequest table.
On conflict, re-query the existing PR.

name: extractContentWordsFromTokens
description: Extract content words from source NLP tokens (non-stop, non-punct lemmas, lowercased).

name: applyHnfPreRules
description: Apply HNF pre-pipeline rules (1, 2, 3).

name: applyHnfPostRules
description: Apply HNF post-pipeline rules (rule 4: Tier-3 isolated semantic judgment).

name: applyMemoryHnfPre
description: Apply HNF pre-pipeline rules to memory recall results.

name: applyMemoryHnfPost
description: Apply HNF post-pipeline rules to ranked memory recall results.

name: applyTermHnfPre
description: Apply HNF pre-pipeline rules to term recall results.

name: HardNegativeRemoval
description: Record of a hard-negative removal.

name: HnfCandidate
description: Unified input interface for the HNF core rules engine.

name: HnfRuleResult
description: Result of an HNF rule check.

name: HardNegativeReason
description: Hard-negative removal reason categories.

name: llmRefineTranslationOp
description:
Post-edit a translation using an LLM.

Sends the candidate translation and glossary context to the LLM,
requiring it to use the given terms strictly, preserve the source meaning,
and maintain consistency with neighboring translations.
Returns the candidate unchanged when no LLM_PROVIDER is available.

name: llmTermAlignOp
description:
LLM term alignment (fallback strategy).

Uses the LLM to judge candidate pairs that vector-based and
statistical alignment could not resolve with high confidence.
Internally batches LLM calls (default 30 pairs per batch).

name: llmTermEnhanceOp
description:
Enhance term candidates using an LLM.

Validates low-confidence candidates via the LLM to determine whether
they are genuine terms, and batch-generates definitions and subjects.

- High-confidence candidates (>= confidenceThreshold) retain statistical
results; only definition/subject is generated.
- Low-confidence candidates require LLM validation before being kept.

name: deriveLlmTranslateConfidence
description:
Derive a confidence score for an LLM translation suggestion.

Base score from memory match confidence, plus fixed bonuses per context signal present.
Hard cap at 0.85, rounded to 4 decimal places.

name: llmTranslateOp
description:
Built-in LLM Translation Suggestion (first-party suggestion source).

Self-loads element info, neighbor translations, element contexts, element metadata,
approved translations, and comments via domain queries. Combines with
caller-provided memory recall and term recall results, then calls the LLM
once to produce a translation suggestion.

Returns `{ suggestion: null }` when:
- No LLM_PROVIDER is available
- The LLM call fails
- The element is not found
- Database access fails

name: loadElementTextsOp
description:
Batch load element texts.

Loads TranslatableElements and their TranslatableString.value in bulk
by operation scope, returning a normalized list.

name: lookupTermsForElementOp
description:
Look up relevant terms for a translatable element from the backend.

Reuses the query chain from the glossary.findTerm route:
element → document → project → glossaryIds → lexical term query.
Uses ILIKE + word_similarity for term matching (no semantic search).

name: placeholderize
description:
Convert a flat token sequence into a placeholder template.

All token types except `text`, `unknown`, and whitespace-like types
are replaced with `{TYPE_N}` placeholders where N is a per-type counter.

name: fillTemplate
description:
Attempt to fill a translation template with values from a source mapping.

Given a translation template, translation slots from the stored memory,
and source slots from the current input text, replaces each placeholder
in the translation template with the corresponding value from the current
source text's slots (matched by placeholder name), falling back to the
stored translation's original value.

name: slotsToMapping
description: Convert PlaceholderSlots to a serializable mapping for DB storage.

name: mappingToSlots
SlotMappingEntry
description: JSON-serializable slot mapping for database storage.

name: insertMemory
description:
Write translations into the specified translation memory banks.

For each translation, generates source and translation templates via
tokenization and placeholderization (templates are only stored when
placeholders are present). Tokenization failures are non-fatal;
the memory item will be inserted without a template.

name: mergeAlignmentOp
description:
Merge multi-strategy alignment results.

1. Fuse vector, statistical, and LLM alignment pairs via weighted-average scores
2. Apply Union-Find transitive closure to form multilingual term groups
3. Conflict resolution: when multiple candidates exist for the same language,
keep the one with the highest connectivity

name: mergePRFull
description:
Full PR merge operation: conflict detection → entry copy to main → entity changes (full rollback) → status update.
Executed in a single database transaction; any step failure triggers full rollback.

name: MergePRFullInput
description: Input parameters for mergePRFull.

name: MergePRFullResult
description: Result of mergePRFull.

name: nlpBatchSegmentOp
description:
Batch NLP segmentation of texts.

Performs linguistic word segmentation in batch mode via the
NLP_WORD_SEGMENTER plugin service. When no plugin is available,
automatically falls back to the built-in Intl.Segmenter, processing
items one by one.

name: intlSegmenterFallback
description:
Built-in fallback segmentation based on Intl.Segmenter.

Called automatically when no NLP_WORD_SEGMENTER plugin is available.
Limitations: no POS tagging (pos set to "X" or "PUNCT"/"NUM"), no
lemmatization (lemma equals the lowercased text), and stop-word
coverage is limited to basic English vocabulary.

name: nlpSegmentOp
description:
Single-text NLP segmentation.

Performs linguistic word segmentation via the NLP_WORD_SEGMENTER
plugin service. When no plugin is available, automatically falls
back to the built-in Intl.Segmenter.

name: parseFileOp
description:
Parse file content into a structured content graph payload.

Parses the file via the FILE_IMPORTER plugin and assembles a
StructuredContentPayload.

name: evaluateAmbiguity
description:
Evaluate four ambiguity rules:
1. Top-tier confidence gap too small (< THRESHOLD between rank-0 and rank-1 in same tier).
2. Top candidates' evidence families diverge (no shared channel at all).
3. Query topic hypothesis is weak / conflicting / unknown AND anchors don't resolve.
4. Top candidate has a recoverable-conflict decision note.

Returns an AmbiguityEnvelope describing whether and where to invoke the model.
Clear Tier-1 winners (tier="1" and no recoverable-conflict) are EXCLUDED from the band.

name: applyBudgetGate
description:
Reserved criteria (any ONE is sufficient):
 - memory exact match (channel "exact" present in evidences)
 - term complete surface equality (channel "lexical" with confidence >= 0.95)
 - template match (channel "template" present)
 - multi-evidence candidate with anchor-compatible match (hasNumericAnchor or hasPlaceholderAnchor)

All remaining candidates enter the competitive pool up to maxTotal.
The budget gate annotates each candidate's `budgetClass` in-place and
returns the trimmed array in reserved-first order.

name: applyDeterministicRanking
description:
Assign tiers to all candidates, sort by tier then in-tier score,
and record tier assignments in rankingDecisions.

name: buildFusionLedger
description:
Build a Fusion Ledger from a flat list of raw results from all lanes.

For each unique candidate (by candidateKey):
 - Keeps the body fields from the highest-confidence lane result.
 - Unions evidences from all lanes (deduped by evidenceKey).
 - Sets confidence = max across all lanes.
 - Records a "ledger-merged" RankingDecision.

Returns RecallCandidate[] sorted by descending confidence.

name: suppressTier3IfClearTier1Winner
description:
After model reranking, suppress Tier-3 candidates when the top result is a
clear Tier-1 winner (no recoverable-conflict note). This prevents low-certainty
single-path noise from appearing alongside a definitive high-confidence match.
@internal — exposed for unit testing only; use runPrecisionPipeline for production code.

name: runPrecisionPipeline
description:
Run the full precision pipeline on a flat list of raw multi-lane results.

This function is surface-agnostic: it works with both RawTermResult[] and
RawMemoryResult[] (and mixed arrays, if ever needed).

name: profileQuery
description:
Extract a QueryProfile from the raw query text.

Rules:
- tokenCount   = word-boundary split on Unicode letters/digits (\p{L}|\p{N})+
- contentWordDensity = tokens that are not pure-stop-words and not pure punct
- isShortQuery  = tokenCount <= 3 AND contentWordDensity >= 0.5
- hasNumericAnchor = any token matches /^\d[\d.,]*$/
- hasPlaceholderAnchor = any token matches %s / %d / {N} / {WORD} patterns
- isTemplateLike = hasPlaceholderAnchor OR (isShortQuery AND hasNumericAnchor)
- hasEntityWord  = any token with 2+ consecutive uppercase letters OR CamelCase ≥6 chars

name: resolveQueryTopic
description:
Infer a QueryTopicHypothesis from the query profile + the Tier-1 candidates
already present in the ledger after the Budget Gate.

Strategy:
 1. Collect topicIds from all candidates that have budgetClass="reserved"
    AND topicAssignment.matchState != "conflict".
 2. Find the majority topicId (highest frequency).
 3. Set confidence:
    - "confident"   if ≥2 reserved candidates agree on the majority topic
    - "weak"        if only 1 candidate provides the majority topic
    - "conflicting" if top-2 topics have the same frequency > 0
    - "unknown"     if no reserved candidate has a topic assignment

NOTE: element context is NOT an input here (per spec §Component Design / Query Topic Resolver).

name: buildAnchorSignature
description: Build an AnchorSignature comparing query vs candidate source text.

name: applyGuards
description:
Apply all three guards to a single candidate.

Hard-filter (non-recoverable) conditions per spec §Component Design / Scope & Anchor Guard:
 - Scope: candidate scopeId not in allowedScopeIds (when allowedScopeIds.length > 0)
 - Topic: topicAssignment.matchState === "conflict" AND query hypothesis is "confident"
 - Anchor: numeric conflict (query has numbers, candidate has different numbers)

Recoverable-conflict conditions:
 - Topic: topicAssignment.matchState === "unknown" AND query hypothesis is "confident"
 - Anchor: placeholder count mismatch (query has placeholders not in candidate)

name: applyGuardsToCandidates
description:
Apply guards to all candidates in the ledger.
Hard-filtered candidates are marked with hardFiltered=true and removed from return value.
Recoverable-conflict candidates get a demotion decision note.

name: computeSparseEvidence
augmentWithSparseLane
description:
Augment raw results with sparse evidence where applicable.
Mutates the evidences array of each result in-place.

name: createTaxonomyRegistry
description:
Create a TaxonomyRegistry from static options.

Compatible-topic resolution (first phase): two topics are compatible if
they are identical OR if the compatibility table explicitly lists them as
compatible. Anything else is "unknown" if the candidate has no topic
assignment, or "conflict" if it has a topic assignment that is NOT in the
compatible set.

name: assignTopics
description:
Apply taxonomy assignments to an array of RecallCandidates in-place.
Mutates `candidate.topicAssignment`.

name: CompatibilityTable
description: Canonical topic compatibility table: topicId → Set of compatible topicIds

name: candidateKey
description: Stable identity key for a candidate (uniquely distinguishes term/memory).

name: LookedUpTermWithPrecision
description: LookedUpTerm extended with optional pipeline decision trace (for regression testing).

name: MemorySuggestionWithPrecision
description: MemorySuggestion extended with optional pipeline decision trace (for regression testing).

name: promoteApprovedTranslationMemoryOp
description: Promote an approved translation into project memories (idempotent and retry-safe).

name: PromoteApprovedTranslationMemoryInput
description: Input for promoting an approved translation into project memories.

name: PromoteApprovedTranslationMemoryOutput
description: Result of approved-translation promotion.

name: runQaReviewForTranslationOp
description: Run deterministic/semantic QA review pipeline for a translation and materialize the review queue item.

name: runSemanticQaReview
description: Run the optional semantic QA review layer and degrade gracefully when disabled, unavailable, or invalid.

name: qaTranslationOp
description:
Run the full QA pipeline for a specific translation.

1. Fetch the translation text, source text, and language information
2. Look up relevant terms (via backend query chain)
3. Tokenize source and translation texts in parallel (with term annotations)
4. Run QA checks
5. Persist QA results

name: qaOp
description:
Quality check.

Runs all registered QA_CHECKER plugin services against the source
text and translation text.

name: sortByQuality
description:
Sort suggestions by source priority + confidence descending + arrival time ascending.

Sort keys (in order):
1. Source priority: LLM translate > advisor
2. Confidence descending (within same source)
3. Arrival time ascending (within same priority and confidence, deterministic)

name: createSuggestionCollector
description:
Suggestion collector with cache-delay guard.

Collects suggestions for minBatchMs, then sorts by quality and yields.
Suggestions arriving after maxWaitMs are appended to the end.

name: QualitySortConfig
description: Sorting configuration.

name: QueuedSuggestion
description: Translation suggestion wrapper with source metadata.

name: rebasePRFull
description: Full PR rebase operation: baseline move → conflict detection → branch status sync.

name: RebasePRFullInput
description: Input parameters for rebasePRFull.

name: RebasePRFullResult
description: Result of rebasePRFull.

name: registerDomainEventHandlers
description:
Register domain event handlers (global singleton).

Subscribes to the following domain events:
- `concept:updated` → triggers concept re-vectorization
- `project:created` → grants owner permission to the creator
- `glossary:created` → grants owner permission to the creator
- `memory:created` → grants owner permission to the creator
- `comment:created` → notifies the translation author of new comment
- `pr:merged` → auto-closes linked issue if present

Idempotent: repeated calls are no-ops.

name: registerVectorizationConsumer
description: Register the vectorization queue consumer and block on recoverable lease restoration before subscribing.

name: selectContextBand
description:
Select a bounded ambiguous top cluster for context-route reranking.

Anchors on the highest-ranked candidate. Extends the band only while
candidates remain locally plausible by deterministic proximity AND have
positive context evidence. Returns null when the cluster is not genuinely
ambiguous or the top candidate is clearly ahead.

name: normalizePrecisionTermCandidate
description: Normalize a term candidate into a RerankCandidateItem for provider submission.

name: normalizePrecisionMemoryCandidate
description: Normalize a memory candidate into a RerankCandidateItem for provider submission.

name: normalizePrecisionCandidates
description:
Normalize a slice of RecallCandidates into RerankCandidateItems.
The index is relative to the slice (for stable candidateId ordering).

name: resolveOperationScopeElementsOp
description: Resolve elements inside an operation scope with chunk metadata.

name: ResolveOperationScopeElementsInput
description: Input type for resolving elements inside an operation scope.

name: OperationScopeElement
description: Operation-scope element with chunk metadata.

name: retrieveEmbeddingsOp
description:
Retrieve embedding vectors for the given chunks.

Fetches vector representations for the specified chunk IDs from
the VECTOR_STORAGE plugin.

name: revectorizeConceptOp
description:
Re-vectorize the structured description text of a termConcept.

Builds the new vectorization text, compares it with the existing
`translatableString.value`, skips when unchanged (dedup), otherwise
vectorizes and updates `termConcept.stringId`.

name: revectorizeOp
description:
Re-vectorize existing chunks.

Updates the embedding vectors of existing chunks using a new
vectorizer. Intended for data migration when switching vectorization
models.

name: runAutoTranslatePipeline
description:
Pre-translation pipeline: check project settings, then for each enabled
language generate candidates and write them to a changeset.

name: searchChunkOp
description:
Vector chunk search.

Supports two query modes:
1. Retrieve existing embeddings from the database by queryChunkIds
2. Pass raw vectors directly via queryVectors (skips DB lookup)

Then performs cosine-similarity search within the specified chunk ID range.

name: searchMemoryOp
description:
Search translation memory.

Searches for matching translation memory entries within the specified
memory banks via vector similarity. Supports two query modes:
lookups by chunkIds (pre-stored embeddings) or queryVectors (raw vectors).

name: applySelfExclusion
description: Remove the current element's own memory items from recall results.

name: semanticSearchTermsOp
description:
Semantic term search.

Vectorizes the query text on the fly and performs cosine-similarity
search against the vectorized termConcepts in the specified glossaries,
returning term pairs semantically related to the query.

Requires each target termConcept to have a vector index built via
{

name: statisticalTermAlignOp
description:
Statistical co-occurrence term alignment.

Exploits the natural translation-pair relationships in the CAT
system for co-occurrence comparison:
- Preferentially uses translation-pair relationships (translationId level)
- Falls back to element-level co-occurrence (elementId level) when
no translations exist

name: statisticalTermExtractOp
description:
Statistical term extraction.

Internally calls {

name: streamSearchMemoryOp
description: Streaming memory search backed by the aggregated recall helper.

name: streamSearchTermsOp
matchTemplateStructure
description:
Perform structural equality template matching for TOKEN_TEMPLATE variants.

If the current query's template strictly equals the candidate's sourceTemplate,
returns confidence 1.0. Otherwise returns null to fall back to pg_trgm similarity.

name: termRecallOp
description:
Term recall.

Given a source text and glossary IDs, finds matching terms via ILIKE +
word_similarity, then enriches each match with its concept subject
information.

name: tokenizeOp
description:
Tokenize text.

Runs all registered TOKENIZER plugins in priority order.

name: triggerConceptRevectorize
description:
Resolve the current TEXT_VECTORIZER / VECTOR_STORAGE plugins and
trigger concept re-vectorization in a fire-and-forget manner when both
are available.

Silently skips when either plugin is unavailable (graceful degradation).

name: triggerTermRecallReindex
description:
Fire-and-forget wrapper around `buildTermRecallVariantsOp`.

Called from the `concept:updated` domain event handler to keep
`TermRecallVariant` rows fresh after any term content change.

Errors are logged but do not propagate (graceful degradation).

name: updateConceptOp
description:
Update the definition and/or M:N subject associations of a termConcept.

After the write completes, the domain event handler automatically
triggers concept re-vectorization.

name: upsertContentNodeFromFileOp
description:
Synchronize file content to translatable elements under a content node
via file parsing and stable-identity diff.

name: vectorTermAlignOp
description:
Term alignment via vector cosine similarity.

1. Vectorize each candidate term (text + definition) and create a
formal TranslatableString
2. Perform pairwise cosine-similarity comparison across language groups
3. Record pairs with similarity >= minSimilarity into alignedPairs

name: processVectorizationBatch
description: Process a batch of vectorization queue tasks: vectorize → backfill chunkSetId → update status → publish event.

name: vectorizeToChunkSetOp
description:
Vectorize texts and store as ChunkSets.

Uses the TEXT_VECTORIZER plugin to convert texts into embedding vectors,
creates ChunkSet/Chunk rows, and persists the vectors via the
VECTOR_STORAGE plugin.

name: serializeAgentDefinition
description: Serialize agent metadata and body content into a complete MD text.

name: ParsedAgentDefinition
description: Full agent definition parsed from MD (metadata + body content).

name: AgentDefinitionMetadata
description: Agent definition metadata type.

name: AgentLLMConfig
description: Agent LLM configuration type.

name: AgentConstraints
description: Agent runtime constraints type.

name: AgentPromptConfig
description: Agent prompt configuration type.

name: AgentSecurityPolicy
description: Agent security policy type.

name: AgentScope
description: Agent scope type.

name: AgentSessionMetadata
description: Agent session metadata type.

name: Orchestration
description: Multi-agent orchestration configuration type.

name: PipelineStage
description: Orchestration pipeline stage type.

name: AgentDefinition
description: @deprecated Use AgentDefinitionMetadata instead.

name: SystemPromptVariable
description: @deprecated Use ParsedAgentDefinition instead.

name: EditorTranslationStatusFilter
description: Editor translation-status filter type.

name: ElementSortMode
description: Element sort-mode type.

name: ElementPriorityReasonCode
description: Priority reason-code type.

name: ElementPrioritySummary
description: Lightweight priority summary type for one element.

name: ScopeTranslationSeed
description: Runtime-only context seed type for batch auto-translation.

name: EditorScope
description: Editor scope type.

name: OperationScope
description: Batch operation scope type.

name: EditorElementQuery
description: Paginated editor element-query type.

name: EditorFirstElementQuery
description: First-element query type.

name: EditorElementPageIndexQuery
description: Element page-index query type.

name: EditorContentNodePathItem
description: Editor content-node path-item type.

name: EditorContentNodeFilter
description: Editor content-node filter type.

name: EditorScopeView
description: Editor scope-view type.

name: EditorElement
description: Editor element-row type.

name: SerializableType
description:
Values serializable to JSON; `Date` is allowed and will be converted to ISO string by `JSON.stringify`.
Safer than `unknown` — functions, symbols, and other non-serializable types are rejected.

name: QaReviewWorkbenchAction
description: Action types for the QA review workbench.

name: SubmitQaReviewActionInput
description: Input payload for submitting a QA workbench action.

name: QaReviewActionResult
description: Result payload for a QA workbench action.

name: RerankCandidateItem
description: Rerank candidate-item type.

name: zip
description:
输入任意个长度相同的数组 a, b, c...
输出由每个数组同一位置元素组成的数组的迭代器

name: assertPromise
summarize
description:
辅助函数：折叠大对象用于日志输出
- 数组显示为 Array(N)
- 对象显示为 {Object}
- 长字符串截断

name: resolveRouteTemplate
description:
Resolve `$ref:<name>` placeholders in a route template string using the provided bindings.

Placeholder syntax: `$ref:<name>` where <name> extends to the next `/` or end of string.
Allowed characters in name: letters, digits, `:`, `-`, `_`.
@throws Error listing all missing binding names if any placeholder cannot be resolved.

name: backfillDirectEditor
description:
One-time migration: grant direct_editor to all existing project editor/admin/owner subjects.
This preserves the previous trust-by-default behaviour for existing projects.

name: ensureDB
description:
在应用启动前执行 \
用于维护数据库中的基本条目 \
不删除现有数据 \
所有修改都是试探性的
@returns

name: ensureRootUser
description:
确保根管理员存在
只有在第一次创建管理员时才为他分配根角色
也即允许根角色和其默认的密码账户被从根管理员处移除

name: registerAuditHandler
description:
注册 handler：批量写入 authAuditLog 表。
使用微批处理（收集 50 条或每 5 秒，一次 batch insert）。

name: createPermissionCache
description:
封装 CacheStore 的权限缓存辅助函数。
直接使用 createPermissionEngine 注入的 CacheStore（即 RedisCacheStore）。

name: isRelationImplied
description:
检查 requiredRelation 是否被 heldRelation 隐含（同一资源类型内）。
例如：持有 "owner" 即隐含 "editor" 和 "viewer"。

name: TransitiveRule
description:
跨资源传递性规则。
语义：如果 subject 对 parentObject 有 parentRelation，
      则隐含对 childObject 有 childRelation。
resolveParentId：给定 child object ID，查 DB 返回 parent object ID。

name: AscendRule
description:
"上溯"规则：element/translation 没有自己的权限元组，
鉴权时自动查找所属 project/content node。

name: seedSystemRoles
description:
系统启动时调用（幂等）：确保 4 个系统角色存在。
使用 INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING。

name: grantFirstUserSuperadmin
description:
在 createAccount 注册流程后调用。
检查是否为首位用户：若是，自动授予 system#superadmin 权限元组，
并将 setting "system:first_user_registered" 设置为 true。

name: loadUserSystemRoles
description:
加载用户的系统角色列表（通过权限元组查询）。
返回用户对 system:* 持有的所有 relation 列表。

name: getPermissionEngine
description:
获取全局单例 PermissionEngine。
必须在调用前先通过 initPermissionEngine 初始化。

name: initPermissionEngine
description:
初始化全局 PermissionEngine 单例。
在应用启动时调用一次。

name: determineWriteMode
description: Determine the write mode (Direct / Isolation) for a subject on a project.

name: CompletedFactor
description: 完成的认证因子信息

name: AuthContext
description: 鉴权上下文，在各入口层创建后透传

name: ObjectRef
description: 引用某个具体对象

name: SubjectRef
description: 引用某个主体

name: WorkerStatus
description:
分布式扩展点

当前实现为单机版本：
- EventBus: InProcessEventBus
- Checkpointer: Memory/Postgres（后续）
- ExecutorPool: LocalExecutorPool
- Scheduler: Single process

name: defineGraph
description:
声明一个类型安全的 DAG 工作流。

- 编译阶段：泛型推断保证节点 input/output schema 匹配
- 运行时：输出标准 GraphDefinition + 注册 step handler
- 执行时：增强的 TransformNodeExecutor 通过 config.handler 分发

name: defineNode
description:
辅助函数：显式声明一个类型安全节点，允许 TypeScript 正确推断 handler 参数类型。

用法：`defineNode({ input: schema, output: schema, handler: async (input) => {...} })`

name: runGraph
description:
Starts a typed graph as a new run and awaits completion.

Uses the global runtime (scheduler, eventBus, checkpointer) initialised by
`createDefaultGraphRuntime`. The `pluginManager` is sourced from the global
runtime unless overridden via `options.pluginManager`.

name: startGraph
description:
Starts a typed graph run and returns a handle containing the `runId`
and a `complete` promise.  Useful when the caller needs the `runId`
upfront (e.g. to filter graph-emitted events before the run finishes).

name: TypedNodeContext
description: Step handler 执行时注入的上下文

name: TypedNodeDef
description: 一个类型安全的节点声明

name: TypedGraphOptions
description: defineGraph 的选项

name: TypedGraphDefinition
description: defineGraph 的返回值

name: EventPayloadMap
description: Maps each EventType to its inferred payload type.

name: TransformNodeExecutor
description:
Transform 节点执行器。

- 若 config.handler 存在 → 从 StepHandlerRegistry 分发执行
- 若 config.handler 不存在 → 保持原有 identity 行为（直接 completed）

name: getStoredGraphRuntimeOrNull
description: Get the global graph runtime, or return `null` when it has not been initialized yet.

name: executeWithVCS
description:
Execute a VCS-audited write in a graph node.
Uses interceptWrite when VCS is configured; falls back to direct writeFn otherwise.

name: collectLLMResponse
description:
Consume an LLM AsyncIterable chunk stream and aggregate all chunks into
a single complete response object. Throws if an error chunk is encountered.

name: CollectedLLMResponse
description: The complete response collected from an LLM stream.

name: detectMobile
description: 尝试从 Node.js HTTP 请求头判断客户端是否为手机。

name: detectMobileFromRequest
description:
尝试从 Web API Request 请求头判断客户端是否为手机。
可在 SSR 环境中直接使用（包括 Vite dev 模式）。

name: getServiceFromDBId
description: 不涉及插件函数调用，可以在事务中安全调用

name: resolvePluginComponentPath
description: 找到指定组件在本地插件目录中的位置

name: RedisTaskQueueOptions
description: Optional configuration for the Redis task queue.

name: setVectorizationQueue
description: Set the global vectorization task queue instance. Should be called once during app bootstrap.

name: getVectorizationQueue
description: Get the global vectorization task queue instance.

name: VectorizationTask
description: Payload type for a vectorization task.

name: CatPlugin
description:
插件核心接口
所有的函数都应该是纯函数或副作用可控的工厂函数

name: PluginAuthContext
description:
插件鉴权上下文
用于在 capability 层做权限拦截

name: PluginContext
description:
插件运行时上下文
包含当前插件的配置、已注册的服务以及当前所处的作用域信息

name: BuiltinPluginEntry
description: Single plugin entry inside the builtin plugin catalog.

name: PluginRuntimeSnapshot
description: Observation snapshot for a single plugin in the in-memory runtime.

name: AgentContextProvider
description:
Agent 上下文提供器插件服务接口。

每个 provider 声明：
1. 自己能提供哪些变量（provides）
2. 自己依赖哪些已有变量（dependencies）
3. 解析逻辑（resolve）

系统通过拓扑排序按顺序调用所有 provider 的 resolve，
将产出的变量累积到同一个 Map 中。

name: ContextResolveContext
description:
解析上下文，传递给 provider 的 resolve 方法。
包含当前已解析的变量 map 和数据库客户端以支持查询。

name: AgentToolProviderToolDef
description: A single tool definition provided by an AGENT_TOOL_PROVIDER plugin service.

name: AgentToolProvider
description:
Plugin service interface for providing custom agent tools.
Plugins implementing `AGENT_TOOL_PROVIDER` register additional tools
that the agent can use during execution.

name: AgentToolConfirmationPolicy
description:
Confirmation policy for agent tools. Controls whether the user
must approve execution before the tool runs.

name: AgentToolTarget
description:
Where the tool executes.
- `server` — Backend execution (default).
- `client` — Frontend (browser) execution via streaming protocol.

name: AuthFactorAAL
description:
Authentication Assurance Level:
- 1: single factor (e.g. password)
- 2: multi-factor (e.g. password + TOTP)

name: AuthFactorInput
description: Input provided by the user for this factor's challenge.

name: AuthFactorResult
description: Result of executing an auth factor.

name: AuthFactorExecutionContext
description: Context passed to an AUTH_FACTOR when it executes.

name: ChatMessageRole
description: Chat message role.

name: ChatMessage
description: A chat message in a conversation.

name: ToolDefinition
description: Tool definition with JSON Schema parameters.

name: ToolCall
description: A tool call initiated by the LLM.

name: ChatCompletionRequest
description: Chat completion request parameters (pure AsyncIterable mode, no onChunk callback).

name: ChatCompletionFinishReason
description: Finish reason for a chat completion.

name: ChatCompletionUsage
description: Token usage for a chat completion.

name: LLMChunk
description: Union type for a single chunk from LLM streaming output.

name: NlpSegmentContext
description: 分词请求上下文

name: NlpBatchSegmentContext
description: 批量分词请求上下文

name: CheckContext
description: QA 上下文

name: hasAvailabilityProbe
description: Determine whether a plugin service implements the availability probe protocol.

name: PluginServiceAvailabilityProbe
description: Protocol for plugin services that expose structured availability probing.

name: PluginServiceAvailability
description: Runtime availability summary for a plugin service.

name: parseInner
challengeVerifierExecutor
description:
challenge_verifier — verify a user-provided challenge (TOTP code, OTP, etc.)
Delegates to the registered AUTH_FACTOR plugin for verification.
The factorId on the node definition selects which factor to use.

name: credentialCollectorExecutor
description:
credential_collector — collect identifier/username input from user.
Stores provided input into `nodeOutputs.<nodeId>` on the blackboard.

name: decisionRouterExecutor
description:
decision_router — a no-op executor node that simply lets the scheduler
evaluate outgoing edge conditions.
The `resolveNextNode` logic in the scheduler handles all routing.

name: identityResolverExecutor
description:
identity_resolver — look up user identity from the identifier stored on
the blackboard. Sets `identity` and `nodeOutputs.<nodeId>.userFound`.
Delegates to the database via `ctx.services.db`.

This executor is a structural placeholder. Actual DB lookup is wired in
the app layer when the scheduler is configured.

name: pluginCustomExecutor
description:
plugin_custom — delegate execution to a plugin-provided executor.
The `factorId` on the node definition selects which AUTH_FACTOR plugin to call.
If no plugin is registered for the factorId, returns a failed result.

name: sessionFinalizerExecutor
description:
session_finalizer — create a session for the authenticated user.
Marks the flow as completed and records the final AAL.

Actual session creation (cookie, session store write) is performed by
the app-layer executor override via `ctx.services.sessionStore`.

name: FlowCacheStore
description: Minimal cache store contract for auth flow snapshot persistence.

name: isLeaseRecoverableTaskQueue
description: Check whether a task queue supports lease recovery.

name: QueueTask
description: A task in the task queue.

name: TaskQueue
description: Task queue interface — abstracts enqueue, dequeue, ack, and nack operations.

name: LeaseRecoverableTaskQueue
description: Task queue interface that supports lease recovery.

name: NotificationPushPayload
description: Notification push payload.

name: EmailProvider
description: Email provider interface implemented by plugins.

name: sendMessage
description: Send a message from anywhere in the backend by publishing message:send-requested.

name: ChannelDispatcher
description: Channel dispatcher interface.

name: MessageRequest
description: Message send request payload.

name: resolvePath
parseExpectedValue
description:
Parse a raw string value into a typed primitive (boolean, number, null, or string).

将原始字符串值解析为类型化的原始值（布尔值、数字、null 或字符串）。

name: evaluateCondition
description:
Evaluate a structured `EdgeCondition` against a blackboard data snapshot.

对黑板数据快照求值结构化的 `EdgeCondition`。

Supported operators:
- `eq` / `neq`: strict equality / inequality
- `exists` / `not_exists`: presence check (non-null/undefined)
- `in`: check whether the field value is included in the provided array
- `gt` / `lt`: numeric comparison (coerces field value to number)

name: buildAgentDAG
description:
Build the Agent DAG graph definition (PreCheck → Reasoning → Tool/Decision → loop).

This definition is used for schema validation and GraphRegistry.
The actual execution logic is implemented imperatively by AgentRuntime calling each node function.

name: AgentBlackboardData
description: Blackboard data structure used by the Agent DAG (stored in Blackboard.data).

name: AgentNodeContext
description: Shared execution context for all Agent DAG nodes.

name: runDecisionNode
description:
DecisionNode: decides whether the DAG loop should continue based on Blackboard state.

Routing priority (high to low):
1. finish tool was called → route to completion
2. maxTurns exhausted → route to failure
3. timeout exceeded → route to failure
4. otherwise → route back to PreCheck to continue loop

name: DecisionOutcome
description: DecisionNode routing decision result.

name: runPreCheckNode
description: PreCheckNode (Phase 0b): step/timeout check + Blackboard update.

name: PreCheckResult
description: PreCheckNode execution result.

name: PreCheckServices
description: Optional services available to PreCheckNode.

name: collectLLMResponse
description: Consume AsyncIterable<LLMChunk> stream and aggregate into a complete LLM response.

name: runReasoningNode
description:
ReasoningNode: reads message history from Blackboard, calls LLMGateway,
aggregates the response, then writes tool calls and output snapshot back to Blackboard.

name: CollectedLLMResponse
description: Aggregated LLM response.

name: ReasoningNodeResult
description: ReasoningNode execution result.

name: runToolNode
description:
ToolNode: reads tool call list from Blackboard, executes all tools concurrently,
and writes results back to Blackboard.

name: ToolNodeResult
description: ToolNode execution result.

name: parseAgentDefinition
description:
Parse an agent MD definition file using the remark pipeline, extracting
frontmatter metadata and body content.

name: LLMGatewayOptions
description: LLMGateway initialization options.

name: LLMGatewayRequest
description: Options for issuing an LLM request through LLMGateway.

name: LLMPriority
description: Priority levels for LLM requests: CRITICAL > HIGH > NORMAL > LOW

name: createAgentLogger
description: Create an AgentLogger instance from a base Logger.

name: createNoopAgentLogger
description: Create a no-op AgentLogger (for testing and placeholders).

name: AgentRunLogEvent
description: L01: Agent run-level log event (run start/end).

name: AgentDAGNodeLogEvent
description: L02: DAG node log event (each node enter/exit).

name: AgentLLMCallLogEvent
description: L03: LLM call log event.

name: AgentToolExecuteLogEvent
description: L04: Tool execution log event.

name: AgentErrorLogEvent
description: L05: Agent error log event.

name: AgentChangeSetLogEvent
description: L06: ChangeSet event log (created, reviewed, applied, rolled_back).

name: AgentLogger
description: Agent structured logger interface.

name: AgentMetricsSnapshot
description: Agent metrics snapshot with counters and distribution data.

name: CompressionConfig
description: Compression pipeline configuration.

name: CompressionStats
description: Statistics from a compression run.

name: SlotPolicy
description: Injection policy configuration for a single slot.

name: PromptConfig
description: Dynamic configuration for PromptEngine.

name: BuildPromptInput
description: Input parameters for PromptEngine.buildPrompt().

name: BuiltPrompt
description: Output of buildPrompt(): the fully constructed message list.

name: estimateTokens
description: Lightweight token estimation: approximates by dividing character count by 4.

name: interpolate
description: Simple {{variable}} string interpolation.

name: AgentRuntimeConfig
description: AgentRuntime initialization configuration.

name: AgentEvent
description: Union type of events emitted by AgentRuntime.runLoop().

name: ErrorRecoveryBudget
description: Error recovery budget snapshot, used to persist current budget consumption.

name: buildPromptVariables
description: Build the variable map passed to the PromptEngine.

name: CreateSessionParams
description: Parameters for SessionManager.createSession().

name: CreateSessionResult
description: Return value of SessionManager.createSession().

name: SessionState
description: Loaded session state for use by AgentRuntime.

name: registerBuiltinAgents
description: Register or update all builtin agent GLOBAL template rows. Called on every startup to keep templates in sync with code.

name: ToolExecutionContext
description: Tool execution context: provides session, permission checks, cost status, and VCS mode.

name: AgentToolDefinition
description: Agent tool definition. Each tool declares its name, description, parameter schema, side-effect type, security level, and execution function.

name: SideEffectType
description: The side-effect type of a tool

name: ToolSecurityLevel
description: Security level required to execute a tool

name: assertContentNodesInSession
description: Verify content-node filters belong to the session project and obey the session content-node scope.

name: resolveEffectiveContentNodeIds
description: Resolve the effective content-node scope for a tool request in the current Agent session.

name: resolveSessionContentNodeContextId
description: Resolve the content-node context ID for the current session.

name: assertElementInSession
description: Verify the given element belongs to the current session's project and editor scope.

name: assertProjectInSession
description: Verify the given project belongs to the current session's project scope.

name: ChangesetEntry
description: Core fields of a changeset entry (mirrors the DB changesetEntry row).

name: AsyncDependencySpec
description: Async dependency spec describing background tasks that must complete when applying a changeset entry.

name: ApplicationResult
description: Result of applying a changeset entry.

name: DependencyStatus
description: Readiness status of an async dependency.

name: ApplicationContext
description: Context for applying a changeset entry.

name: ApplicationMethod
description: Application method interface, separating synchronous CRUD from async-dependent operations.

name: detectConflicts
description: Detects conflicts: compares main changes since branch creation with branch changes.

name: mergeBranch
description:
Merges a branch into main:
1. Detect conflicts
2. If conflicts exist, mark hasConflicts=true and return
3. If no conflicts, apply branch changes as a new main changeset
4. Update branch status=MERGED

name: rebaseBranch
description:
Rebase: updates the branch's baseChangesetId to the latest main changeset and rewrites
the before-values of UPDATE/DELETE entries to reflect the current main state.

name: readWithOverlay
description:
Reads an entity in branch context: checks the most recent branch changeset entry first,
then falls back to main data.
Returns null if deleted in branch, or if no branch changes exist (caller reads from main).

name: listWithOverlay
description:
List query overlay: merges main data with branch changes
(CREATE appended, DELETE removed, UPDATE overwritten).

name: getBranchChangesetId
description: Gets the latest changeset ID associated with the given branch.

name: getBranchBaseChangesetId
description: Gets the baseChangesetId of a branch.

name: Changeset
description: Changeset summary for internal agent use.

name: registerAllDiffStrategies
description: Register all entityType diff strategies into the registry (including content graph entities)

name: FieldChange
description: Field-level change description

name: DiffResult
description: Diff computation result

name: DiffStrategy
description: Entity diff strategy interface

name: EditorOverlayContentNodeRow
description: Content-node row type for editor branch overlays.

name: EditorOverlayContentRelationRow
description: Content-relation row type for editor branch overlays.

name: EditorOverlayElementRow
description: Element row type for editor branch overlays.

name: EditorOverlayTranslationState
description: Translation-state type for editor branch overlays.

name: createSimpleMethods
description: Create SimpleApplicationMethod instances for multiple entityTypes.

name: EntityStateFetcher
description: Entity state fetcher callback, provided by the registrar for rebase before-rewrite.

name: shallowDiff
description: Shallow field-level diff between two objects, returning changed fields

name: createGenericStrategy
description: Generic strategy factory using shallowDiff

name: VCSContext
description: VCS operation context — determines whether to generate audit records.

name: wireEntityStateFetchers
description:
Inject EntityStateFetcher into each method in the registry.
Called once at server startup so rebase before-rewrite can query actual DB tables.

name: encodeJsonPointerPart
description: Escape a JSON Pointer path segment (RFC 6901).

name: toJsonPointerRef
description: Combine a namespace and a list of path parts into a stable JSON Pointer-style reference.

name: ElementLocation
description: Optional source location information.

name: ElementData
description: A parsed translatable element with stable identity references and local order.

name: SerializeElement
description: Minimal element descriptor needed for serialization.

name: FileParser
description: File parser interface: parses file content into translatable elements and serializes translated elements back to file content.

name: buildLocaleBridgeMaterial
description: Build bootstrap memory material and evidence from locale catalogs.

name: LocaleBridgeDiagnostic
description: Diagnostic emitted by the locale bridge.

name: LocaleMemoryMaterial
description: Translation-memory material emitted by the locale bridge.

name: LocaleBridgeResult
description: Locale bridge result.

name: writeBootstrapRunReport
description: Write a bootstrap run report.

name: BootstrapRunReport
description: Bootstrap run report.

name: runBootstrapSourceGraph
description: Run bootstrap source collection, locale bridge, and structured diff ingestion.

name: RunBootstrapSourceGraphInput
description: Input for running bootstrap source graph ingestion.

name: RunBootstrapSourceGraphResult
description: Result of running bootstrap source graph ingestion.

name: LoadedLocalSeedOverride
description: Summary of a loaded local seed override source, excluding config values.

name: LoadDevSeedOptions
description: Optional local override settings for loading a development seed.

name: loadSeedRuntimeEnv
description: Load seeder runtime env from preferred env files and make database/cache addresses prefer file values by default.

name: SeedRuntimeEnvOptions
description: Options for loading seeder runtime environment variables.

name: SeedRuntimeEnvLoadResult
description: Result of loading seeder runtime environment variables.

name: assertSafeDatabaseTarget
description: Determine whether a database URL clearly targets development/test.

name: DatabaseSafetyOptions
description: Safety options for database reset.

name: LocalSeedConfig
description: Local seed override config type.

name: BootstrapLocaleCatalog
description: Bootstrap locale catalog type.

name: BootstrapProfile
description: Bootstrap profile type.

name: truncateAllTables
description:
TRUNCATE all application tables with CASCADE.
Preserves table structure and enum types — only data is cleared.

We query pg_tables to get all tables in the current schema,
then TRUNCATE them all at once. This avoids hardcoding table names
and automatically adapts to schema changes.

name: CachedChunk
description: Single chunk with embedding vector and optional metadata.

name: toCollectionPayload
description: Assemble SourceExtractionGraphResult + platform routing into StructuredContentPayload.

name: collect
description: Collect translatable elements from source files and return a StructuredContentPayload.

name: extract
description: Extract translatable elements from source files, returning graph-structured result (no platform params).

name: extractFromScript
description: Extract i18n calls from TypeScript/JavaScript source code.

name: normalizeI18nText
description: Normalize i18n text for stable references and locale matching.

name: buildTextFingerprint
description: Build a source text fingerprint for diagnostics and meta only, not stable identity.

name: buildStableSourceRef
description: Build a stable element reference that does not depend on source line numbers.

name: StableSourceRefInput
description: Input required to build a stable source reference.

name: extractFromTemplate
description: Extract i18n calls from a Vue template AST.

name: SourceCollectionDiagnostic
description: Diagnostic emitted during source collection.

name: ExtractOptions
description: Extraction options for a source extractor.

name: SourceExtractor
description: Source extractor interface — pluggable i18n text extraction implementation.

name: CollectOptions
description: Options for the collect() function.

name: SourceExtractOptions
description: Options for the extract() function (pure extraction, no platform params).

name: PayloadRoutingOptions
description: Platform routing parameters for toCollectionPayload().

name: SourceExtractionGraphResult
description: Graph-structured result from source extraction (with nodes, relations, evidence).

name: authenticateBrowser
description:
Handle browser authentication.
If storageStatePath is provided and valid, restore session from it.
Otherwise, navigate to login page and fill the multi-step auth flow
(identifier → password, driven by Ory Kratos).

name: loadRouteManifest
description:
Load a route manifest from a JSON or YAML file.
Supports both new RouteManifest format and legacy array-of-routes format.

name: loadBindings
description: Load bindings from a JSON file and validate.

name: mergeBindings
description: Merge bindings: file bindings as base, CLI bindings override.

name: resolveRoutes
description: Resolve a RouteManifest into concrete ScreenshotRoute[] by replacing $ref placeholders.

name: collectScreenshots
description:
Collect screenshots: launch browser, traverse routes, locate elements and screenshot.
For each route, iterates unique element texts and takes one screenshot per text.
Each screenshot is associated with the first element matching that text (not all).

name: captureScreenshots
description:
Capture screenshots for elements across routes, returning CaptureResult.
Similar to collectScreenshots but works with ExtractionResult elements
and returns the new CaptureResult format.

name: ScreenshotRoute
description: Screenshot route configuration — describes a page to screenshot.

name: CapturedScreenshot
description: Captured screenshot info — local file info and associated element for a single screenshot.

name: ScreenshotCollectOptions
description: Screenshot collection options.

name: UploadOptions
description: Upload options — for uploading screenshots to the platform.

name: CaptureStrictOptions
description: Strict capture coverage options.

name: resolveUrl
description:
Resolve a potentially relative URL to an absolute one.
When storage is proxied, prepareUpload returns relative URLs like `/api/storage/upload/:id`.

name: resolveElementId
description: Resolve an element database ID from seeder bindings.
